title: What is HSNC University Merit List 2026-27?

detail.title: What is HSNC University Merit List 2026-27?
detail.short_info: Download HSNC Merit List 2026-27 for UG courses. First Merit List released for H.R. College, K.C. College, Law School, Data Science & Management programs. Check your name now at hsncu.edu.in.

content.text: HSNC Merit List 2026-27 has been released for various UG and PG programs across constituent colleges like H.R. College, K.C. College, and specialized schools under HSNC University (HSNCU). HSNC University (Hassaram Rijhumal College of Commerce & Economics - H.R. College and Kishinchand Chellaram College - K.C. College) publishes merit lists for admissions to undergraduate and postgraduate courses for the academic year 2026-27. Students can check the official merit lists on the university website and respective college portals. First merit lists for several programs are now available as of mid-May 2026.

sections.heading: HSNC Merit List 2026-27 Overview Table

rows: BAMMC, BCOM, BAF, BFM, BMS, BBI, BCOM-WM, BCOM-THM, BCOM-RM
M.Com. Advanced Accountancy, MSC Chemistry, MSC-IT, etc.
BSC Data Science & Business Analytics, B.Sc Actuarial Science & Finance

sections.heading: What is HSNC University Merit List 2026-27?

content.text: HSNC University (a state public university in Mumbai) conducts centralized admissions for its prestigious constituent colleges, primarily H.R. College of Commerce & Economics and K.C. College of Arts, Commerce & Science. The merit lists are prepared based on Class 12 marks (and entrance tests where applicable, e.g., for BMS/ Law programs). These lists determine seat allocation for popular courses in commerce, management, law, data science, and more. Multiple rounds (First, Second, etc.) are released to fill remaining seats.
This comprehensive guide helps students track releases, check their status, understand the process, and complete admissions smoothly.

sections.heading: H.R. College Merit List 2026-27

content.text: H.R. College is one of the most prestigious commerce colleges under HSNC University. The First Merit Lists for 2026-27 have been published.

sections.heading: UG First Merit List Table:
K.C. College Merit List 2026-27
School of Applied Sciences Merit List 2026-27

rows: B.Sc - Data Science and Business Analytics

sections.heading: Niranjan Hiranandani School of Management and Real Estate Merit List 2026-27
D.M. Harish School of Law Merit List 2026-27
How to Check HSNC Merit List 2026-27 Online (Step-by-Step)

items: Visit the official page: hsncu.edu.in/merit-list-26-27.
Navigate to your college/school section (H.R. College, K.C. College, etc.).
Click on the relevant program and merit list (PDF format).
Search your name or application number using Ctrl+F.
Download and save the PDF for reference.

content.text: Important: Always use the official HSNC University website to avoid fake links.

sections.heading: Admission Process After Merit List

items: Verify your name in the list.
Complete online/offline document verification as instructed.
Pay the admission fees within the deadline.
Submit undertaking forms if required.
Wait for subsequent lists if not selected in the first round.

content.text: Keep checking the portal regularly for updates on second, third, and further merit lists.
